ticket.subject: I'm unable to automatically calculate FedEx shippi...
ticket.raw_subject: I'm unable to automatically calculate FedEx shippi...
ticket.description:
I'm unable to automatically calculate FedEx shipping costs to Hong Kong.

I've tried it for several other countries without any problems.

The issue might be related to switching my FedEx account to the REST API recently.

Please investigate this issue immediately.

------------------
送信元: https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.io/home/views/orders/status/allorders

comments.body:
Dear Sir,



The countries experiencing errors were Hong Kong, Taiwan, and China.

There may be other countries experiencing errors.

Please address this issue as soon as possible.



Best regards,

Kenji Hasegawa

Cybershaft

comments.body:
Hello Kenji,

We are sorry for any inconvenience caused.

For Hong Kong and Taiwan address where the Postal Code is not available or not mandatory, currently the rates are not shown. I have forwarded the case to our team for further investigation.

I added a product to the cart and checked rates for a Chinese address and the FedEx rates are shown at the checkout.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/YLJljOqSz7X9ujAjepiDpX7fy/?name=image.png)

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Kenji,
 
We are sorry for any inconvenience caused. 
 
For Hong Kong and Taiwan address where the Postal Code is not available or not mandatory, currently the rates are not shown. I have forwarded the case to our team for further investigation.
 
I added a product to the cart and checked rates for a Chinese address and the FedEx rates are shown at the checkout.
 

 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
L3 - Rates failure for HK and Taiwan address from FedEx Rest

As the postal code is not available and not mandatory for the above mentioned countries, the rates were not provided by FedEx with the error message "postalCode can not be null"

In the request, we are not passing any node for postal code under recipient address. I have attached the Request Response for reference

Please check and let us know of the updates

Store URL - cybershaft.myshopify.com
App - Shopify MCSL
Account ID - bc72311a-e3f8-4faf-af85-8649c5b4bd51
comments.html_body:
L3 - Rates failure for HK and Taiwan address from FedEx Rest
 
As the postal code is not available and not mandatory for the above mentioned countries, the rates were not provided by FedEx with the error message "postalCode can not be null"
 
In the request, we are not passing any node for postal code under recipient address. I have attached the Request Response for reference
 
Please check and let us know of the updates
 
Store URL - cybershaft.myshopify.com 
App - Shopify MCSL
Account ID - bc72311a-e3f8-4faf-af85-8649c5b4bd51

comments.body:
Dear Sagar,



Thank you for your prompt investigation.

As you pointed out, for China and Taiwan, the shipping cost was automatically calculated based on the postal code entered.

Orders from customers in Hong Kong are currently delayed, so we've decided to treat Hong Kong as a separate, independent area and handle shipments via both DHL and FedEx to avoid problems until they are resolved.



We await the results of the investigation and the measures taken in Hong Kong.



Best regards,

Kenji Hasegawa
comments.html_body:
Dear Sagar,

 

Thank you for your prompt investigation.

As you pointed out, for China and Taiwan, the shipping cost was automatically calculated based on the postal code entered.

Orders from customers in Hong Kong are currently delayed, so we've decided to treat Hong Kong as a separate, independent area and handle shipments via both DHL and FedEx to avoid problems until they are resolved.

 

We await the results of the investigation and the measures taken in Hong Kong.

 

Best regards,

Kenji Hasegawa
